data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Flat Amid 'Reciprocal Tariffs' Talk By Trump: Why This Analyst Said BTC Was In 'No Man's Land'
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies traded flat Thursday amid President Donald Trump's announcement of "reciprocal tariffs" and yet another hotter inflation data.

data.title: Florida's Medicaid Disaster: 1.3 Million Cut From Coverage, One of the Highest Disenrollment Rates in the U.S.
Will Tesla Finally Enter India? Modi-Musk Meeting Reportedly Focused On Tariffs, Starlink Licensing, And SpaceX
data.description: PM Modi met Elon Musk in Washington, D.C., to potentially discuss Tesla's delayed entry into India, Starlink's pending approval, and potential SpaceX-ISRO collaboration, amid ongoing regulatory and tariff challenges.

data.title: Cathie Wood Offloads $17 Million Worth Of Surging Robinhood Shares, Buys Up Deere & Co Stock Despite Decline In Net Sales
data.description: On Thursday, February 13, 2025 Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest sold $17.01 million worth of Robinhood shares even as the stock ended the day higher by almost 14%. Ark purchased Deere & Co. stock worth about the same amount.

data.title: Trump-Modi Meeting: India To Amp Up US Weapons Purchases, Will Receive F-35 Stealth Fighters
data.description: Trump announced the U.S. will boost military sales to India from 2025, including F-35 jets, though the deal's timeline remains uncertain.
